response.overview: Since childhood, Pedro and Juan have been inseparable, bound by family and shared memories. As adults, their lives take opposite paths — Pedro rises as a powerful drug dealer, while Juan becomes a federal agent committed to the law.  What begins as distance turns into conflict when their worlds collide. Pedro, driven by ambition, challenges his brother, while Juan refuses to compromise his duty.  As tensions escalate, loyalty is replaced by pride and violence, leading them toward a tragic confrontation.  In a world where power and justice cannot coexist, two brothers are forced to face each other, knowing that their choices will change their lives forever.
response.title: El Odio De Dos Hermanos
